=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(!!)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(!!) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(@@)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(@@) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(|>)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(|>) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="accept"| value Header.Name.accept >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="accept_charset"| value Header.Name.accept_charset >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="accesslog"| value Messages.accesslog >> ~[<<a_api | module Messages >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Write a message in access~.log
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly.add >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.add >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add ~~path c v m>> adds the cookie <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|c>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add"| value Cache.Dlist.add >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Adds an element to the list~,
      and possibly returns the element that has been removed if the maximum
      size was exceeded~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_cookies"| value Response.add_cookies >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||

>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_header"| value Response.add_header >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_header"| value Request.add_header >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_module_init_function"| value Loader.add_module_init_function >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_module~_init~_function name f>> adds function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>>
    to the initialisation functions to be run
    when <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|init~_module name>> is called~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_multi"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.add_multi >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_multi new old>> adds the cookies from <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|new>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|old>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_ocamlpath"| value Loader.add_ocamlpath >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Adds a path to the ~Findlib library search path~.
>>
|

>>

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="badconfig"| value Extensions.badconfig >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Convenient function for raising ~Error~_in~_config~_file exceptions with
    a sprintf~-formatted argument~.
>>
|

>>

>>
|

>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="client_conn"| value Request.client_conn >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The way the client connects to the server ~(for example~, its ~I~P address if
    connected over the internet~)~.
>>
|

>>

>>

>>

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="findfiles"| value Loader.findfiles >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|findfiles pkg>> returns the list of files needed to load ~Findlib
    package <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|pkg>>~, including dependencies~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="first_diff"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.first_diff >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|first~_diff s~1 s~2 n last>> returns the index of the first difference
     between s~1 and s~2~, starting from n and ending at last~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fixup_url_string"| value Lib.Url.fixup_url_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib.Url >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fold"| value Cache.Dlist.fold >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|fold over the elements from the cache starting from the newest
      to the oldest
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fold_back"| value Cache.Dlist.fold_back >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|fold over the elements from the cache starting from the oldest
      to the newest
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fold_left"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.fold_left >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Infinite fold on circular lists ~(use with care!~)
>>
|

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="full_server_name"| value Config.full_server_name >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="get"| value Polytables.get >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get t k>> returns the current binding of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>> or raises <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Not~_found>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="get"| value Ocsigen_stream.get >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|call this function if you decide to start reading a stream~.
>>
|

    server name or port~.
>>

      otherwise ~(a reasonable default~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="in_list"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.in_list >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||

    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|name>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="insert"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.insert >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="is_prefix_skip_end_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.is_prefix_skip_end_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_prefix~_skip~_end~_slash path~1 path~2>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|path~1>> is the same
      as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|path~2>> before a first slash
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="iter"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.iter >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Infinite iteration on circular lists
>>
|

>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="listdirs"| value Extendconfiguration.listdirs >> ~[<<a_api | module Extendconfiguration >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="loadfile"| value Loader.loadfile >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|loadfile pre post force file>> ~(dynamically~) loads <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|file>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="loadfiles"| value Loader.loadfiles >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|loadfiles pre post force file>> loads all the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|files>>~, using
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|loadfile ~(fun ~(~) ~-~> ~(~)~) ~(fun ~(~) ~-~> ~(~)~) false>> for all the files
    but the last one~, and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|loadfile pre post force>> for the last one
    ~(if any~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="location"| value Header.Name.location >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="logdir"| value Config_static.logdir >> ~[<<a_api | module Config_static >>~]||

      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|writer write>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="make"| value Response.make >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make a response from a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~.~Response~.t>>~.
>>
|

>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="make_cryptographic_safe_string"| value Lib.make_cryptographic_safe_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Generate an unique and cryptographically safe random string~.
>>
|

>>
|

>>

    for the client ~(depending on the server configuration and request~)
>>

>>

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse"| value Lib.Url.parse >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib.Url >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|parse url>> returns a tuple containing information about <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|url>>
       ~If url contains scheme ~'https~'~, host of url ~(ex~: http~:~/~/www~.ocsigen~.org~/ ~-~> www~.ocsigen~.org~)~, port of url~, path as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|string>> without first ~'~/~'~, path as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|string list>>~, ~G~E~T query of url~, lazy value to decode ~G~E~T query 
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse"| value Header.Accept_language.parse >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Accept_language >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse"| value Header.Accept_encoding.parse >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Accept_encoding >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse"| value Header.Accept.parse >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Accept >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse"| value Header.Mime_type.parse >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Mime_type >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse_config"| value Parseconfig.parse_config >> ~[<<a_api | module Parseconfig >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Returns the config file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse_content_type"| value Multipart.parse_content_type >> ~[<<a_api | module Multipart >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse_mime_types"| value Charset_mime.parse_mime_types >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parsing of a file containing mime associations~, such as ~/etc~/mime~-types
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="parse_user_dir"| value Extensions.parse_user_dir >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="path"| value Request.path >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="path"| value Accesscontrol.path >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="path_string"| value Request.path_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="port"| value Request.port >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="port"| value Accesscontrol.port >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="post_params"| value Request.post_params >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="post_params"| value Multipart.post_params >> ~[<<a_api | module Multipart >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="pragma"| value Header.Name.pragma >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="prefix_and_path_of_t"| value Lib.Url.prefix_and_path_of_t >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib.Url >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|prefix~_and~_path~_of~_t url>> splits <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|url>> in a couple <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(prefix~, path~)>> where
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|prefix>> is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"http~(s~)~:~/~/host~:port">> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|path>> is the path as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|string list>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="process_element"| value Extensions.Configuration.process_element >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions.Configuration >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Process an ~X~M~L element by the specifications~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="process_elements"| value Extensions.Configuration.process_elements >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions.Configuration >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Application of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|process~_element>> on a list of ~X~M~L elements~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="protocol"| value Accesscontrol.protocol >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="put"| value Ocsigen_stream.StringStream.put >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream.StringStream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a stream with one element
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\Q|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="query"| value Request.query >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="range"| value Header.Name.range >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="referer"| value Header.Name.referer >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="refuse_pcdata"| value Extensions.Configuration.refuse_pcdata >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions.Configuration >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="register"| value Extensions.register >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~For each extension generating pages~, we register its name and six functions~: a function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|fun~_site>> of type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|parse~_config>>~. ~This function
    will be responsible for handling the options of the configuration
    files that are recognized by the extension~, and potentially generating
    a page~.~, a function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|end~_init>> that will be called at the end of the initialisation
    phase of each site~, a function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|init~_fun>> that will be called just before registering the
    extension~, taking as parameter the configuration options between
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<extension~>>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<~/extension~>>>~. ~This allows to give configuration options
    to extensions~. ~If no function is supplied~, the extension is supposed to
    accept no option ~(and loading will fail if an option is supplied~)
    ~See <<a_api | val Extensions.Configuration.process_elements >> for
    the easy construction of such a function~.~, a function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|exn~_handler>> that will create an error message from the
    exceptions that may be raised during the initialisation phase~, and raise again
    all other exceptions
    ~Moreover~, if the optional parameter <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~?respect~_pipeline>> is <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>>~,
    the extension will ask the server to respect the order of the
    pipeline~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="register_basic_authentication_method"| value Authbasic.register_basic_authentication_method >> ~[<<a_api | module Authbasic >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This function registers an authentication plugin~: it adds a new
    parser to the list of available authentication schemes~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="register_command_function"| value Command.register_command_function >> ~[<<a_api | module Command >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Use a prefix for all your commands when you want to create
    extension~-specific commands~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="reload"| value Server.reload >> ~[<<a_api | module Server >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Reload the configuration of the server~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Polytables.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove t k>> remove the current binding of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>> if it exists
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove c cookie~_table>> removes the cookie <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|c>> from <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Cache.Dlist.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Removes an element from its list~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_assoc"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_assoc >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_assoc_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_assoc_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_dotdot"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_dotdot >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_dotdot path>> cleans the path of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~.~.>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_end_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_end_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_end~_slash str>> removes last <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~/>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_if_any"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_if_any >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_if_any_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_if_any_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_header"| value Response.remove_header >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_internal_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_internal_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_internal~_slash path>> cleans the path of empty string
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_n_oldest"| value Cache.Dlist.remove_n_oldest >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|remove the n oldest values ~(or less if the list is not long enough~) ~;
      returns the list of removed values
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_slash_at_beginning"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_slash_at_beginning >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_slash_at_end"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_slash_at_end >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_spaces"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.remove_spaces >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_spaces s beg endd>> returns a copy of the string from beg to endd~,
      removing spaces at the beginning and at the end
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="replace_header"| value Response.replace_header >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="replace_headers"| value Response.replace_headers >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="replace_user_dir"| value Extensions.replace_user_dir >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|raises <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Not~_found>> is the directory does not exist
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="request_cache"| value Request.request_cache >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="resolve"| value Local_files.resolve >> ~[<<a_api | module Local_files >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Finds <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|filename>> in the filesystem~, with a possible redirection
    if it is a directory~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="respond"| value Response.respond >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>> but with an interface similar to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~_lwt~_unix~.~Server~.respond>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="respond_error"| value Response.respond_error >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_deprecated"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|respond~_string>> with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~Error~: ">> appended to the body~.
>>>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="respond_file"| value Response.respond_file >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Respond with the content of a file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="respond_string"| value Response.respond_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Like <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|respond>> but with a fixed string body~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="response"| value Response.response >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Raw response without cookie headers set~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="return"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.return >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Staticmod.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Staticmod >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Run static mod on a specific directory~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Rewritemod.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Rewritemod >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~realm ~~auth ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Revproxy.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Revproxy >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~redirection ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Redirectmod.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Redirectmod >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~redirection ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Outputfilter.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Outputfilter >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~mode ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Deflatemod.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Deflatemod >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~mode ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Cors.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Cors >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="run"| value Authbasic.run >> ~[<<a_api | module Authbasic >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|run ~~realm ~~auth ~(~)>> makes it possible to use this extension without
    configuration file~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Ocsigen_cohttp.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Multipart.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Multipart >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Local_files.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Local_files >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Loader.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Extensions.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Deflatemod.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Deflatemod >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Authbasic.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Authbasic >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="section"| value Accesscontrol.section >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="sep"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.sep >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Cuts a string to the next separator~, removing spaces~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="serve_everything"| value Extensions.serve_everything >> ~[<<a_api | module Extensions >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="server"| value Header.Name.server >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="server_name"| value Config.server_name >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="service"| value Ocsigen_cohttp.service >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|initialize a main loop of http server
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set"| value Polytables.set >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set t k v>> associates <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|v>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_bindir"| value Config.set_bindir >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_buffer_size"| value Deflatemod.set_buffer_size >> ~[<<a_api | module Deflatemod >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_client_timeout"| value Config.set_client_timeout >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_command_pipe"| value Config.set_command_pipe >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_compress_level"| value Deflatemod.set_compress_level >> ~[<<a_api | module Deflatemod >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_configfile"| value Config.set_configfile >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_cookie"| value Header.Name.set_cookie >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_daemon"| value Config.set_daemon >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_datadir"| value Config.set_datadir >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_debug"| value Config.set_debug >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_debugmode"| value Config.set_debugmode >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_default_charset"| value Config.set_default_charset >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_default_charset"| value Charset_mime.set_default_charset >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_default_mime"| value Charset_mime.set_default_mime >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_disablepartialrequests"| value Config.set_disablepartialrequests >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_extdir"| value Config.set_extdir >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_filebuffersize"| value Config.set_filebuffersize >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_finaliser_after"| value Cache.Dlist.set_finaliser_after >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|set a function to be called automatically on a piece of data
      just after it disappears from the list
      ~(either by explicit removal or because the maximum size is exceeded~)
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_finaliser_before"| value Cache.Dlist.set_finaliser_before >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|set a function to be called automatically on a piece of data
      just before it disappears from the list
      ~(either by explicit removal or because the maximum size is exceeded~)
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_global_log_level"| value Config.set_global_log_level >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Set the log level for all ~Ocsigen log sources~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_init_on_load"| value Loader.set_init_on_load >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~If set to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>>~, the module initialization functions passed to
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_module~_init~_function>> will be executed directly~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_logdir"| value Config.set_logdir >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_max_number_of_connections"| value Config.set_max_number_of_connections >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_maxrequestbodysize"| value Config.set_maxrequestbodysize >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_maxrequestbodysizeinmemory"| value Config.set_maxrequestbodysizeinmemory >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_maxretries"| value Config.set_maxretries >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_maxsize"| value Cache.Dlist.set_maxsize >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|change the maximum size ~;
      returns the list of removed values~, if any~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_maxthreads"| value Config.set_maxthreads >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_mimefile"| value Config.set_mimefile >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_minthreads"| value Config.set_minthreads >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_module_init_function"| value Loader.set_module_init_function >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_module~_init~_function name f>> registers the function <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>>~, which will
    be used to initialize the module when <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|init~_module name>> is called~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_ocamlpath"| value Loader.set_ocamlpath >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Sets the current ~Findlib library search path~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_pidfile"| value Config.set_pidfile >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_ports"| value Config.set_ports >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_respect_pipeline"| value Config.set_respect_pipeline >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_server_timeout"| value Config.set_server_timeout >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_shutdown_timeout"| value Config.set_shutdown_timeout >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_silent"| value Config.set_silent >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_ssl_info"| value Config.set_ssl_info >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_ssl_ports"| value Config.set_ssl_ports >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_status"| value Response.set_status >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_syslog_facility"| value Config.set_syslog_facility >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_usedefaulthostname"| value Config.set_usedefaulthostname >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_verbose"| value Config.set_verbose >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set_veryverbose"| value Config.set_veryverbose >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="shutdown"| value Ocsigen_cohttp.shutdown >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cohttp >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Shutdown main loop of server
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="site"| value Server.site >> ~[<<a_api | module Server >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Each host may contain some sub~-sites corresponding to
    subdirectories in the ~U~R~L~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="size"| value Cache.Dlist.size >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="skip"| value Ocsigen_stream.skip >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Skips data~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="snd"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3.snd >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3 >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.split >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Splits a string for words with separator~,
      removing spaces~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split_at"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.split_at >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split_fragment"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.split_fragment >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|split~_fragment str>> splits <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|str>> at first ~'~#~'
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="ssl"| value Request.ssl >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="ssl"| value Accesscontrol.ssl >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="start"| value Server.start >> ~[<<a_api | module Server >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Start the server with some instructions~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="starts_with"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.starts_with >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Stdlib~.~String~.starts~_with>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="status"| value Response.status >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="status"| value Header.Name.status >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="stop"| value Accesscontrol.stop >> ~[<<a_api | module Accesscontrol >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="stream_want"| value Ocsigen_stream.stream_want >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|stream~_want s len>> ~Returns a stream with at least len
    bytes in the buffer if possible
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="string_of_stream"| value Ocsigen_stream.string_of_stream >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Creates a string from a stream~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="string_of_url_path"| value Lib.Url.string_of_url_path >> ~[<<a_api | module Lib.Url >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="sub_path"| value Request.sub_path >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="sub_path_string"| value Request.sub_path_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="substream"| value Ocsigen_stream.substream >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_stream >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Cut the stream at the position given by a string delimiter
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="thd"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3.thd >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3 >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="timeofday"| value Request.timeofday >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_cohttp"| value Request.to_cohttp >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_list"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.to_list >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_poly"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.to_poly >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_response_expert"| value Response.to_response_expert >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Response for <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Cohttp~_lwt~_unix~.~Server~.make~_expert>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_string"| value Header.Name.to_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_string"| value Config.Socket_type.to_string >> ~[<<a_api | module Config.Socket_type >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="transfer_encoding"| value Response.Body.transfer_encoding >> ~[<<a_api | module Response.Body >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="transfer_encoding"| value Header.Name.transfer_encoding >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="translate"| value Loader.translate >> ~[<<a_api | module Loader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|translate filename>> translate ~.cmo~/~.cma extensions to ~.cmxs in
    native mode~, and ~.cmxs to ~.cmo ~(~.cma if it exists~) in bytecode
    mode~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="tries"| value Request.tries >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="uncurry"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.uncurry >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="unexpected_exception"| value Messages.unexpected_exception >> ~[<<a_api | module Messages >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Use that function for all impossible cases in exception handlers
    ~(<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|try ~.~.~. with ~.~.~. ~| e ~-~> unexpected~_exception ~.~.~.>> or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Lwt~.catch ~.~.~.>>~)~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="up"| value Cache.Dlist.up >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Removes the element from its list without finalising~,
      then adds it as newest~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update"| value Response.update >> ~[<<a_api | module Response >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update"| value Request.update >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update_charset_ext"| value Charset_mime.update_charset_ext >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Updates the mapping between extensions from a file to its charset~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update_charset_file"| value Charset_mime.update_charset_file >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]||

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update_mime_file"| value Charset_mime.update_mime_file >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="update_mime_regexp"| value Charset_mime.update_mime_regexp >> ~[<<a_api | module Charset_mime >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="uploaddir"| value Extendconfiguration.uploaddir >> ~[<<a_api | module Extendconfiguration >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="uri"| value Request.uri >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="user_agent"| value Header.Name.user_agent >> ~[<<a_api | module Header.Name >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|

|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="value"| value Cache.Dlist.value >> ~[<<a_api | module Cache.Dlist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="version"| value Request.version >> ~[<<a_api | module Request >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="version_number"| value Config_static.version_number >> ~[<<a_api | module Config_static >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="version_number"| value Config.version_number >> ~[<<a_api | module Config >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\W|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="warning"| value Messages.warning >> ~[<<a_api | module Messages >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Write a message in warnings~.log
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="write"| value Response.Body.write >> ~[<<a_api | module Response.Body >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\X|

\\
